title: Investigator (hybrid)
jd_text: We are recruiting Investigators (known internally as Investigation Officers) in a range of locations, including remote. These roles are available in our Assessment and Early Resolution Team (AERT) and our Investigation Teams.Both full time and part time roles are available. We receive thousands of reports every year raising allegations of misconduct and regulatory breaches against those we regulate. AERTAERT consider these reports first and decide whether the SRA should investigate further. They make enquiries and gather any further information we need for our assessment, identify any potential breach of our rules and prioritise high risk matters. They then consider the strength and quality of the evidence so far and whether the matter is capable of being evidenced. Sometimes we can guide the firm/solicitor to become compliant or change their processes for the future. Taking everything into account, AERT will decide to close the matter or pass it on for a full investigation. The work is high volume and fast paced; we need those with a keen eye for detail and an analytical and curious mindset as every case is different.InvestigationMatters assessed as serious are passed to our Investigation teams. coordinate with internal and external partners/vendors.Evaluate and improve internal processes and systems (branching strategy, code review quality, testing frameworks, release practices, on-call health).Status reporting to partners; align expectations and communicate risks, dependencies and trade-offs.Procurement/Finance support: PO/Invoice/Billing approvals for relevant services and vendors.Must HavesServer-side engineering in C#/.NET (e.g., ASP.NET, Web APIs) with production experience in live, large-scale systems.Experienced with databases (SQL and NoSQL) and caching (e.g., Redis): schema design, query optimisation, data migrations, and operational best practices.Hands-on with CI/CD (Jenkins/GitLab), version control (Git/GitLab flows), infrastructure and hosting (on-prem and/or AWS), and observability (logs/metrics/tracing) for live services.Track record designing for performance, scalability, reliability and security, including load/perf profiling and budget setting.Ability to plan and deliver complex features; jd_text: We are looking for volunteers to help share information about a flagship project in Western Kenya, which will empower local communities to create their own sustainable future through climate-resilient agriculture, digital inclusion, and the development of entrepreneurial skills .What difference will you make?Your input in sharing information about the projects on the ground in Kenya, and the impact they have for the local community will be invaluable for informing audiences, existing and new, about the importance of a local, small scale, place based, holistic and community led approach to international development that leads to real change, especially for girls and women. Since we began in 2008, Twende Pamoja, with Team Kenya's support, has transformed the lives of over 80,000 people in Ndhiwa, including 25,000 young girls. Team Kenya is not as a delivery agency, but as a partner, supporter, and advocate, working to mobilise resources and raise awareness in the UK so that Twende Pamoja can implement projects on the ground which really benefit the local community. It is really important that we communicate this message clearly and effectively, and with your help we can make sure this happens and raise awareness about the real differences this approach is making to people in Ndhiwa.What are we looking for?We are looking for someone who has strong writing skills in terms of voice, ideas, presentation, conventions, organization, word choice, and sentence fluency. You must be able to write relatable content of different lengths and style to suit different audiences and different platforms. You will be reliable, honest and open to feedback and have excellent organisation and time management skills. In terms of creativity, you will be used to developing unique, engaging angles, storytelling, and headlines that resonate with the target audience. Experience of effective storytelling is also desirable, as well as experience of persuasive writing, as evidenced by clicks and donations.What will you be doing?We need talented content creators and copy writers with research experience and creativity to produce engaging, material which will reach new audiences and increase our supporter base. With our partner organisation, Twende Pamoja, in Ndhiwa, we are improving and expanding an existing eco-cottage site by up grading the facilities to increase visitor numbers. At the same time the small conference centre will provide digital training for women and youths and the demonstration farm will help the growth of local agri-business with crops which can adapt to the changing climate. We need to be able to communicate our plans clearly and in ways which will not only reach, but also touch individuals and organisations in such as way that they will want to support this journey, both financially and in terms of any relevant skills and knowledge in the fields of climate change, small scale agri-business and social enterprise. This is a great opportunity to really make a difference if you have experience of any of the following writing compelling, actionable copy, producing informative, long and short-form content, and the ability to adapt across various platforms, from social media to websites.

You will develop your craft across both short-form and long-form copywriting, supporting high-performing top-of-the-funnel campaigns while continuously refining messaging through testing, optimisation and analytics. This role offers the opportunity to deepen your expertise in written communication, attention to detail and workload management, while building strong influence through ideas that shape how our brand is experienced.Your TeamYou will collaborate closely with the wider marketing team, working alongside demand generation, social media, content, studio and design colleagues to deliver cohesive and impactful campaigns. title: Interior Design Manager
jd_text: What to ExpectThe purpose of the role of an Interior Design Manager is to lead the design and development of innovative and high-quality future vehicle interiors, blending cutting-edge aesthetic concepts with functional engineering. This individual will be responsible for conceptualising and creating visually compelling, ergonomically efficient, and market-relevant interior designs of both concept and production vehicles. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams, manage a talented group of designers, and ensure that our interiors not only meet customer expectations but also align with brand identity and market trends. You will have the opportunity to unleash your creativity and passion for automotive design while honing your leadership skills in a collaborative and supportive environment. This is an exciting opportunity to make a significant impact in the automotive industry. Build key relationships and collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop innovative Interior design concepts. You will work closely with other departments such as engineering, marketing, and manufacturing, ensuring that the interior design aligns with technical feasibility, market positioning, and production requirements. Presenting design proposals to internal stakeholders, executives, and external partners, the design manager effectively communicates the rationale behind design decisions and persuasively advocates for their implementation.What You'll DoThe Interior Design Manager supports senior design leadership in project planning, budgeting, and timeline management to ensure timely delivery of high-quality design solutions. Marketing and branding team collaboration is vital in aligning designs with consumer trends, brand identity, and market position. Frequent collaboration with ergonomics, PQ, HMI and UX, to ensure the designs are highly usable and built to the highest standards. Close collaboration with the engineering teams is crucial to ensure that the interior design is not only aesthetically striking but also functional and manufacturable. Present design concepts and strategies internally to design leadership and product management, effectively communicating the rationale behind decisions.Lead design reviews, supplier meetings, and digital/physical model evaluations. Reviews and guides surfaces with modelling teams for production alignment. Ensure aesthetic intent is maintained through feasibility reviews, tooling constraints, and engineering integration. Collaborate closely with clay modelers, CAS teams, and engineering departments to refine proportions and surface details. Drive design quality through all project phases — from early ideation to final surface release. Interpret and evolve the brand’s interior design language into exciting, functional, and usable interior spaces. Support the refinement and development of selected design directions, retaining design and engineering excellence. Lead a team of talent Interior designers to generate advanced and production-ready interior design concepts through sketches, digital renderings, and 3D models.What You'll BringYou have extensive knowledge and hands-on experience in automotive interior design, engineering, and materials.You can evaluate, refine, and optimise automotive interiors, taking into account aesthetics, craftsmanship and functionality.You stay ahead of trends inside and outside of automotive design, materials innovation and technologies.You can logically and efficiently break down complex challenges and propose innovative solutions, whether related to design, ergonomics, manufacturing processes, or engineering components.You enjoy working on technical details and have a passion for pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.You intuitively demonstrate a drive to collaborate, and ensure consistent communication across departments and teams.You manage a team of Interior Designers to align on objectives, timing and project requirements.You can bridge the gap between concept design and manufacturing, ensuring that the interior design vision can be achieved efficiently and to the highest standards.You are detail-oriented and committed to quality, ensuring that the interior design and development processes meet both internal and external standards.You actively participate in demonstrating and defining the interior design standards, validating and guiding physical and digital/VR models.You have a passion for continuous improvement and learning, keeping up-to-date with emerging trends and innovations in technology, design, and the automotive market.You are always looking for ways to improve efficiency and workflows, showing a willingness to change and adapt.You are able to articulate complex design ideas, technical challenges, and solutions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including senior management and external partners.You provide clear and actionable recommendations while maintaining a collaborative and solution-focused attitude.You are able to build narrative and presentation stories to best sell design themes.Advanced Sketching & Visualization: Communicative freehand sketching and digital rendering to explore and communicate designs clearly, and 3D visualization skills alongside Photoshop to produce high-level presentation content visuals.Creative Concept Development: Ability to generate original, forward-thinking design concepts that align with brand identity and future mobility trends.3D Modelling Proficiency: Expertise in software such as Alias or Blender, for creating and exploring concept themes, as well as aiding communication with the CAS modelling team.Creative team communication: Clear, considered design direction given to Design team colleagues, CAS and clay modelling teams, to support efficient design development.Design Strategy: Skill in developing a compelling design narrative and translating it into impactful design concepts.Story Telling: Skilled in creation of PPT presentation content and narrative, to best sell ideas and design themes to a wide audience.Knowledge of Automotive Trends: Deep understanding of industry trends, competitor landscape, and consumer expectations.Technical & Engineering Awareness: Ability to design within manufacturing, safety, ergonomic, and regulatory constraints.Collaboration & Communication: Strong interpersonal skills to work effectively with engineering, marketing, and leadership teams.Attention to Detail: High level of precision, care and refinement in all stages of the design process.
